posts.text: Newsom’s press office: “We cooperated, the allegations were baseless, it’s a Trump fishing expedition.” Bullshit. The government doesn’t flip insiders and wire them up in a broader corruption probe if it’s truly nothing. A chief of staff already pleaded guilty. An ally wore the wire inside the orbit. Public records show the investigation had legs. When the inner circle starts recording each other, the house of cards is collapsing. Follow the guilty pleas and transcripts, not the spin.
posts.author: BarbarianCap

posts.text: Do you realize that the Zionist modus operandi, since the Nakba has been to control information? Now these had 15M views. Just think a bit how things can fall apart.
posts.author: nntaleb
